nodes.label: CMS Audit E2E Test Suite — Highlands Motel & Cafe ==============================
nodes.norm_label: cms audit e2e test suite — highlands motel & cafe ==============================

nodes.label: POS as Source of Truth
nodes.rationale: POS owns hotel operations data (rooms, room types, pricing, walk-in bookings). Website owns customer-facing content and customer bookings. POS wins on operational conflicts.

nodes.label: Idempotency Framework
nodes.rationale: Crash-safe 3-phase protocol: reserve (INSERT NULL result) â†’ execute â†’ complete (UPDATE result). If server crashes mid-flight, next call finds NULL result and re-executes safely.

nodes.label: Circuit Breaker Pattern
nodes.rationale: 10 failures in 30s sliding window â†’ OPEN (block 30s) â†’ half-open â†’ probe 1 request â†’ close on success or reopen on fail.

nodes.label: Offline Mutation Queue
nodes.rationale: IndexedDB-backed (Dexie.js), leader-based drain via BroadcastChannel, max 5 retries with backoff 1sâ†’2sâ†’4sâ†’8sâ†’30s, dead-letter after 300s.

nodes.label: G-1: Websiteâ†’POS Booking Sync Gap
nodes.rationale: CRITICAL: create-booking does NOT push to POS at any point. Customer pays â†’ booking is Website-only â†’ POS never sees it. Risk: double-booking, missed arrivals.

nodes.label: G-2: Guest Email Missing in POS
nodes.rationale: CRITICAL: POS bookings table has no guest_email column. Website requires email. Email lost on sync.
nodes.norm_label: g-2: guest email missing in pos

nodes.label: G-3: Payment Model Mismatch
nodes.rationale: Website tracks advance_amount+balance_amount. POS tracks total_amount+paid_amount. Pre-paid Website booking shows as unpaid in POS.

nodes.label: G-9: No Idempotency on Website
nodes.rationale: Website has no idempotency framework (only Fonepay nonces). Duplicate sync events can create duplicate bookings.

nodes.label: Phase 1: Zero Double-Booking
nodes.rationale: Exclusion constraint on bookings (room_id + daterange) to prevent overlapping active bookings. btree_gist extension enabled. TOCTOU races removed from edge functions.

nodes.label: Phase 2: Strict HMAC Validation
nodes.rationale: Startup check for BOOKING_WEBHOOK_SECRET missing â†’ service refuses all requests. Â±5 min timestamp tolerance. No lenient fallback paths.

nodes.label: Phase 3: Auto-Healing Sync
nodes.rationale: sync_repair_jobs with full audit trail. Dry-run mode via x-repair-mode: dry_run header. NEVER auto-fix missing_booking, duplicate_booking, room_mismatch, orphaned_record.

nodes.label: Phase 5: E2E QA Certification
nodes.rationale: 12 test dimensions scored 0-100 with pass/fail matrix. Verdict: PRODUCTION READY â‰¥ 95%, READY WITH WARNINGS â‰¥ 80%, NOT READY < 80%.

nodes.label: TOCTOU Race Condition Removal
nodes.rationale: Removed SELECTâ†’INSERT race from create-booking, booking-webhook, and pos-sync-api edge functions. Exclusion constraint catches conflicts atomically.

nodes.label: POS Room State Machine
nodes.rationale: available â†’ reserved â†’ booked â†’ occupied â†’ cleaning â†’ available, or occupied â†’ maintenance. 8-status enum: available, reserved, booked, occupied, partial_paid, fully_paid, cleaning, maintenance.

nodes.label: Website Customer Booking Flow
nodes.rationale: Browse â†’ Select Dates â†’ Select Room â†’ Guest Details â†’ Fonepay QR â†’ Confirm. CRITICAL GAP: create-booking does NOT push to POS at any point.

nodes.label: POS Motel Booking Flow
nodes.rationale: Create Booking â†’ Check-In â†’ Room Services â†’ Check-Out â†’ Invoice â†’ Payment. POSâ†’Website sync at creation, check-in, check-out, cancel all WORKING.
